extDesc.message: Turn your new tab into an organized workspace. Keep bookmarks separated by context. Minimalist and beautiful.

settings_startup_desc.message: Select which views to open in new tabs when Chrome starts:

settings_root_folder.message: Where should the Organizer folders be placed?

settings_toggle_folders.message: Create 4 folders in Chrome Bookmarks : Organizer A, Organizer B, Organizer C, Organizer D

settings_toggle_desc.message: If turned off, automatic moving stops. Existing folders in Chrome are preserved.

settings_swap_desc.message: Safely swap the contents of two Organizers.

add_bookmark_folder_info.message: When 'On', the new folder is created inside the Organizer folder (A, B, C or D). When 'Off', it is created in the root of the bookmark bar/other bookmarks.

add_bookmark_select_desc.message: Select one or more bookmark folders to display as panels:

add_bookmark_recursive_desc.message: Also import subfolders inside the selected folders?

upgrade_desc1.message: Upgrade: The extension now works with special folders! We use the principle: What you see in the extension is what you have in Chrome.

upgrade_desc2.message: Each Organizer (A, B, C, and D) gets its own physical folder in your Chrome bookmarks. This keeps everything neatly separated. When you move a panel later (via right-click or the swap button), the extension will automatically move the corresponding physical folder in Chrome.

upgrade_where.message: Where do you want us to create the 4 main folders for you?

alert_provide_name.message: Please provide a name for the new folder.

alert_auto_move_off.message: Automatic folder moving is disabled. Your existing Organizer folders have NOT been removed.

alert_select_two_different.message: Please select two different organizers to swap.

alert_swap_success.message: Content swapped successfully. The page will now reload.

alert_select_one_folder.message: Please select at least one bookmark folder.

alert_import_success.message: Data imported successfully! The page will now reload.

confirm_enable_folders.message:
We use the principle: What you see in the extension is what you have in Chrome.

4 folders (Organizer A, B, C, D) will be created in Chrome Bookmarks. When you move panels via right-click or swap, the corresponding folders in Chrome will also be moved.

Do you agree?

confirm_import_overwrite.message: Are you sure you want to import this data? Your current layout and settings for THIS VIEW will be overwritten.

confirm_flattening.message: Note: all folders will be placed in the root of the Organizer folder (including subfolders), any tree structures will be lost -- everything will become one flat structure with all folders next to each other without subfolders. If you agree, the folder structure will be effectively flattened in Chrome. Do you want to continue?

confirm_swap.message: Are you sure you want to swap the contents?

move_panels_rightclick.message: Move Individual Panels by Rightclicking Panel Header

notification_title.message: New Tab Organizer Updated to v

notification_message.message: New features: Full multilingual support and improved date display in the sidebar!
